local_evidence.before: Weakest preview included repeated <command-name>/clear</command-name> wrapper records.
local_evidence.after: Post-fix scan with --source claude-code-projects --limit 80 --preview-limit 10 --weakest-first --include-prompts --no-export --json returned containsCommandWrapper=false.

candidate.problem: Claude command wrapper records were shaped as user-role messages and survived text extraction as weak prompts.
candidate.risk: CLI command events such as /clear polluted weak-prompt previews and repair queues.
candidate.decision: Drop command wrapper text in strip_injected_context so push_record treats it as empty.

red.evidence: The new test failed with 2 records instead of the expected 1.

green.evidence: The focused test passed after command wrapper records were stripped to empty text.

full_verification.evidence: 10 UI helper tests passed, Vite build passed, 37 Rust library tests passed, 13 CLI tests passed, doc-tests passed, and strict clippy passed.

post_fix_smoke.evidence: containsCommandWrapper=false; scan stopped at configured limit of 80 prompts as expected.
